rationale: The citing paper explicitly emphasizes proposing a maximum-likelihood estimator for a random-coefficients differentiated-products demand model and benchmarking it against GMM, while the cited paper’s core contribution is a simulated maximum-likelihood estimator for aggregate random-coefficient logit demand.
